achievements.title: Oh Boy, He's On Fire!

achievements.title: Don't Forget To Save
achievements.description: Take a close look of Resetti.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Where It All Began
achievements.description: Play as Classic Sonic.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Not Just A Coke
achievements.description: Play as Pepsiman.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Punch Me In My Face
achievements.description: Play as Sandbag.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Hands Up
achievements.description: Unlock Master Hand as a playable character.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Super Mario Clash.
achievements.description: In a Free-for-All Battle as Mario or Luigi against Bowser on the stage 'World 1-1' do a full cycle on the stage without taking damage with Level 5 CPU.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Feels Nostalgic!
achievements.description: In a Free-for-All Battle as Mario against Bowser on the stage 'Bowser's Stadium' throw Bowser directly into a bomb using the backthrow with Level 5 CPU.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Haunted Madness
achievements.description: Win a Free-for-All Battle as Mad Piano against Luigi on the stage 'Big Boo's Haunt' with Level 9 CPU.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Intergalactic Showdown
achievements.description: Win a Free-for-All Battle as Wolf against Fox on the stage 'Venom' with Level 9 CPU.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Decisive Fight
achievements.description: Win a Free-for-All Battle as Ganondorf against Link on the stage 'Ganon's Tower' with Level 9 CPU.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Twin Phazon Fury
achievements.description: Win a Free-for-All Battle as Dark Samus against Samus on the stage 'Norfair' with Level 9 CPU.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Lost In Time
achievements.description: Win a Free-for-All Battle as Young Link against Link on the stage 'Deku Tree' with Level 9 CPU.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: A Well-Known Rematch
achievements.description: Win a Free-for-All Battle as King Dedede against Kirby on the stage 'Mt. Dedede' with Level 9 CPU.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Win For Once!
achievements.description: Win a Free-for-All Battle as Lanky Kong against Donkey Kong on the stage 'Jungle Japes' with Level 9 CPU.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Magic In Vegas
achievements.description: Win a Free-for-All Battle as Kirby using the Top Hat on the stage 'Casino Night Zone' against a Level 9 CPU.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Metal of Honor
achievements.description: Win a Free-for-All Battle as Metal Mario or Metal Luigi against their normal versions on the stage 'Metallic Madness' with Level 9 CPU.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Without Fear
achievements.description: Win a Free-for-All Battle against a Level 10 CPU.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Historical Lession
achievements.description: Win a Free-for-All Battle between Goemon and Ebisumaru on the stage 'Edo Town' with Level 9 CPU.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Diddy's Christmas Knockout
achievements.description: Win a Free-for-All Battle between Conker and Banjo & Kazooie on the stage 'Frosty Village' with Level 9 CPU.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Coming Soon...
achievements.description: Win a Free-for-All Battle between Giga Bowser and Giant Donkey Kong on the stage 'New Pork City' with Level 9 CPU.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Oh Snap!
achievements.description: Win a Free-for-All Battle between Pikachu and Mewtwo on the stage 'Meta Crystal' with Level 9 CPU.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: For My Kingdom!
achievements.description: Win a Free-for-All Battle between Marth and Roy on the stage 'Castle Siege' with Level 9 CPU.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Doctor's Order
achievements.description: Win a Free-for-All Battle between Dr. Mario and Dr. Luigi on the stage 'Dr. Mario' with Level 9 CPU.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Not This Again...
achievements.description: Win a Free-for-All Battle between Yoshi, Mario, Luigi and Wario on the stage 'Peach's Castle II' with Level 9 CPU.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Star Fox Assault
achievements.description: Win a Free-for-All Battle between Fox, Falco, Peppy and Slippy on the stage 'Sector Z' with Level 9 CPU.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Superior Animal Mascot
achievements.description: Win a Free-for-All Battle between Pikachu, Sonic, Banjo & Kazooie and Crash on the stage 'Windy' with Level 9 CPU.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Legends of the Seven Stars
achievements.description: Win a Free-for-All Battle between Mario, Yoshi, Bowser and Peach on the stage 'Bowser's Keep' with Level 9 CPU.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Dragon King: The Fighting Game
achievements.description: Win a Free-for-All Battle between four Dragon King on the stage 'Dragon King' with Level 9 CPU.
achievements.author: SporyTike

achievements.title: Still In Beta
achievements.description: Win a Free-for-All Battle between four Polygon Fighters on the stage 'Dream Land Beta 1' or 'Dream Land Beta 2' with Level 9 CPU.
achievements.author: SporyTike
